description:
A collection of Active Directory Tools to streamline Active Directory

Active Directory Pro Toolkit is an easy to use Active Directory Tools that makes managing Active Directory fast, easy and efficient. Automate tasks that are consuming your time and resources.
Improvements
Section titled “Improvements”
- Nested Group Membership report: Now shows only nested (indirect) members. Direct members are excluded since they already appear in the Group Members report
- Nested Group Membership report: Added Risk column that flags members as “High” when the top group or any group in the nesting path is a privileged group (Domain Admins, Enterprise Admins, Schema Admins, Administrators, Account Operators, Backup Operators, Server Operators, Print Operators, DnsAdmins, Group Policy Creator Owners, Protected Users, Key/Enterprise Key Admins)
- Nested Group Membership report: Added Risk filter to quickly narrow down to High risk members
- Nested Group Membership report: Removed Membership Type column since only nested members are now shown
- What’s New popup: Replaced embedded WebBrowser with native WPF rendering. Links now open in the system default browser
